message:
Massively expand test suites across 40+ connector crates

Add comprehensive unit tests to client, error, types, and connector
modules across the entire connector ecosystem. This is a broad test
coverage push touching 220 files with ~39,000 lines of new test code.

Common patterns added across all connectors:

client.rs tests:
- Auth variant clone/debug/redacted_label coverage
- Bearer token redaction verification (secret never leaks in Display/Debug)
- is_secretless() correctness for credential-based vs token-based auth
- Default base URL value and scheme assertions
- Client construction with custom and empty URLs
- Path preservation in base URL configuration

error.rs tests:
- Display and Debug output verification for all error variants
- is_retryable() correctness: 429/502/503/504 retryable, 4xx not
- retry_after() for RateLimited with zero, normal, and large values
- to_fcp_error() conversion preserving retry_after and error messages
- HTTP and JSON error wrapping Display output

types.rs tests:
- Serde round-trip (serialize then deserialize) for all request/response types
- Default trait verification for config and parameter structs
- Enum variant coverage for API-specific types
- Field accessor and builder pattern tests

connector.rs tests:
- ConnectorMetadata field verification (name, version, capabilities)
- Supported operations enumeration
- Rate limit configuration defaults
- Connector trait implementation smoke tests

Connectors covered: 1password, airtable, algolia, amplitude,
annas-archive, anthropic, arxiv, asana, bitbucket, bitwarden, box,
clickup, cron, datadog, docusign, dropbox, duckdb, elasticsearch,
evernote, github, gitlab, grafana, homeassistant, hubspot, intercom,
kubernetes, linkedin, logseq, mailchimp, mcp-bridge, metabase, mixpanel,
monday, mongodb, n8n, openai, pandadoc, pinecone, plaid, posthog,
pulumi, reddit, retool, roam, salesforce, segment, semanticscholar,
sendgrid, sentry, snowflake, spotify, stripe, telegram, terraform,
todoist, trello, twilio, webhook-receiver, zapier, zendesk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
